testcase.name: adopt command family > is idempotent on the fixture repo
adopt command family > handles clean reports, skipped directories, dry-runs, and mixed schema generation
verifyAuditChain > uses the default pg client factory when no override is supplied
buildProgram > declares the expected command tree and option defaults
buildProgram > runs init, doctor, and privacy commands
buildProgram > runs migration commands and emits JSON output
buildProgram > runs audit verification in json, valid-human, and broken-human modes
buildProgram > runs adoption scan/apply/link commands
@stynx/cli > scaffolds a consumer app skeleton
@stynx/cli > scaffolds without Angular files when angular=false
@stynx/cli > writes the deterministic scaffold contract
@stynx/cli > runs doctor against a fixture directory
@stynx/cli > reports doctor spawn failures with fallback exit code and empty output strings
@stynx/cli > generates ROPA markdown from privacy yaml
@stynx/cli > generates empty and retention-aware ROPA markdown
@stynx/cli > scans and applies the neutral adoption fixture with richer outputs
@stynx/cli > matches cognito users by email
@stynx/cli > verifies audit hash chains across tenants
@stynx/cli > verifies one audit tenant, clamps invalid limits, and always closes the client
@stynx/cli > clamps audit limits above the maximum
@stynx/cli > defaults audit limit when the caller passes zero
runDoctor > normalizes nullish spawn status and captured output
migrate command surface > reports pending/applied/rollbackable migrations
migrate command surface > uses the default pg client factory when no factory override is supplied
migrate command surface > applies, rolls back, and redoes paired migrations
migrate command surface > lists migrations and supports dry-run up/down/redo without applying changes
migrate command surface > filters migration specs to forward sql files and records deterministic checksums
migrate command surface > uses the default platform migration directory when none is supplied
migrate command surface > rejects rollback of migrations without a down pair
migrate command surface > keeps dry-run rollback validation for migrations without a down pair
migrate command surface > fails redo when a migration file disappears between rollback and replay
migrate command surface > rolls back SQL transactions when migration up or down execution fails
migrate command surface > promotes bootstrap objects when the extension migration is already applied or just applied
